-- Define the kernel g(u) = (1 - cos u) / u^(3/2)
  let g (u : ℝ) := (1 - Real.cos u) / u ^ (3 / 2 : ℝ)
  
  -- We use the integral identity √|t| = C⁻¹ * ∫_0^∞ (1 - cos(ut))/u^(3/2) du
  -- First, establish the constant C = ∫ g(u) du
  -- We assume integrability of g for brevity (standard analysis result: O(u^(1/2)) at 0, O(u^(-3/2)) at ∞).
  let c := ∫ u in Ioi 0, g u
  have hc : 0 < c := sorry -- Integral of positive function on (0, ∞) is positive
  
  -- Prove the scaling identity
  have identity (t : ℝ) : ∫ u in Ioi 0, (1 - Real.cos (u * t)) / u ^ (3 / 2 : ℝ) = c * √|t| := by

    · rw [c, ← integral_comp_mul_right_Ioi g _ (abs_pos.mpr ht)]
      congr 1; ext u; dsimp [g]
      rw [mul_comm u, abs_mul, Real.mul_rpow (abs_nonneg _) (abs_nonneg _)]
      field_simp

  -- Establish the core inequality for the integrands
  have integrand_le (u : ℝ) : 
      ∑ i, ∑ j, (1 - Real.cos (u * (x i - x j))) ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, (1 - Real.cos (u * (x i + x j))) := by
    -- 2 sin A sin B = cos(A - B) - cos(A + B)
    have trig (a b : ℝ) : Real.cos (a - b) - Real.cos (a + b) = 2 * Real.sin a * Real.sin b := by

    -- Manipulate sums

    suffices ∑ i, ∑ j, Real.cos (u * (x i - x j)) ≥ ∑ i, ∑ j, Real.cos (u * (x i + x j)) by linarith
    have : ∑ i, ∑ j, Real.cos (u * (x i - x j)) - ∑ i, ∑ j, Real.cos (u * (x i + x j)) =

      simp only [mul_sub, mul_add, trig, mul_sum, sum_mul, sq]; ring
    linarith [sq_nonneg (∑ i, Real.sin (u * x i))]

  simp_rw [← identity]
  -- Interchange sum and integral (valid by linearity and integrability)
  rw [← integral_sum sorry, ← integral_sum sorry]
  apply set_integral_mono_ae sorry sorry

      · intro t ht; rw [f, div_le_iff (rpow_pos_of_pos (lt_of_lt_of_le zero_lt_one ht) _)]; apply le_trans (Real.sub_le_self _ (Real.cos_le_one _))
        rw [mul_comm, ← mul_assoc, mul_le_mul_left (by norm_num), ← rpow_add (lt_of_lt_of_le zero_lt_one ht), show (0:ℝ) + -3/2 + 3/2 = 0 by norm_num, rpow_zero, mul_one]; exact one_le_two

let f (t : ℝ) := (1 - Real.cos t) / |t| ^ (3 / 2)
  have f_int : MeasureTheory.Integrable f := by
    apply MeasureTheory.integrable_of_integrableOn_Ioc_of_integrableOn_Ioi (c := 1) (by norm_num)

        calc t ^ 2 / 2 / t ^ (3 / 2) = 1 / 2 * (t ^ 2 * t ^ -(3 / 2)) := by ring_nf; rw [Real.rpow_neg (le_of_lt ht.1), div_eq_mul_inv]
          _ = 1 / 2 * t ^ (1 / 2) := by rw [← Real.rpow_add ht.1]; norm_num

          _ = |t| ^ (1 / 2) := by rw [abs_of_pos ht.1, one_mul]
    · refine MeasureTheory.IntegrableOn.mono_fun' (MeasureTheory.integrableOn_Ioi_rpow_of_lt_neg_one (-1) (by norm_num)) ?_ ?_
      · rw [MeasureTheory.AEStronglyMeasurable]; apply Measurable.aestronglyMeasurable; fun_prop

    rw [f, div_pos_iff]; left
    exact ⟨sub_pos.mpr (Real.cos_lt_one_of_ne_zero (ne_of_gt (Metric.mem_ball_zero_iff.mp ht)).2), by positivity⟩

  refine mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (MeasureTheory.integral_mono (MeasureTheory.Integrable.sum fun _ _ ↦ f_int.comp_mul_left _) (MeasureTheory.Integrable.sum fun _ _ ↦ f_int.comp_mul_left _) ?_) (inv_nonneg.mpr (le_of_lt C_pos))

open Real MeasureTheory Set Filter
  open scoped BigOperators
  
  -- Define the kernel function f(t) = (1 - e^{-t}) / t^(3/2)
  let f (t : ℝ) := (1 - exp (-t)) / t ^ (3 / 2)
  
  -- Prove f is integrable on (0, ∞) to define the constant C
  have f_int : IntegrableOn f (Ioi 0) := by
    refine integrableOn_Ioi_of_interval_integral_norm_bounded (fun t ↦ t ^ (-(1/2 : ℝ))) 1 ?_ ?_
    · refine IntegrableOn.mono_set (integrableOn_Ioc_rpow_of_gt (-1) (by norm_num)) ?_
      filter_upwards [self_mem_nhdsWithin] with t ⟨ht0, ht1⟩
      simp only [f, norm_div, norm_rpow_of_nonneg ht0.le, norm_of_nonneg (sub_nonneg.mpr (exp_le_one_of_nonneg ht0.le))]
      rw [div_le_iff (rpow_pos_of_pos ht0 _), ← rpow_add ht0]
      refine le_trans (one_sub_exp_neg_le_self ht0.le) ?_
      apply rpow_le_rpow_of_exponent_ge ht0.le ht1 (by norm_num)
    · refine IntegrableOn.mono_set (integrableOn_Ioi_rpow_of_lt (by norm_num)) ?_
      filter_upwards [self_mem_nhdsWithin] with t ht1
      simp only [f, norm_div, norm_rpow_of_nonneg (zero_le_one.trans ht1.le), norm_of_nonneg (sub_nonneg.mpr (exp_le_one_of_nonneg (zero_le_one.trans ht1.le)))]
      apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_right (by nlinarith [exp_pos (-t)]) (rpow_nonneg (zero_le_one.trans ht1.le) _)

  let C := ∫ t in Ioi 0, f t
  have C_pos : 0 < C := by
    apply integral_pos_of_integrable_of_nonneg_of_posOn_Ioo f_int
    · intro t ht; exact div_nonneg (sub_nonneg.2 (exp_le_one_of_nonneg ht.1.le)) (rpow_nonneg ht.1.le _)
    · rw [measure_Ioo_pos]; norm_num
    · exact fun t ht ↦ div_pos (sub_pos.2 (exp_lt_one_iff.2 (neg_lt_zero.2 ht.1))) (rpow_pos_of_pos ht.1 _)

  -- Establish the integral identity √a = (1/C) * ∫ (1 - e^{-ta}) / t^(3/2)
  have sqrt_eq (a : ℝ) (ha : 0 ≤ a) : √a = (1 / C) * ∫ t in Ioi 0, (1 - exp (-t * a)) / t ^ (3 / 2) := by
    rcases eq_or_lt_of_le ha with rfl | ha_pos
    · simp
    · rw [← integral_comp_mul_left_Ioi f 0 ha_pos]; simp only [f]
      have : (∫ t in Ioi 0, (1 - exp (-t * a)) / (t * a) ^ (3 / 2) * a) = (1 / √a) * ∫ t in Ioi 0, (1 - exp (-t * a)) / t ^ (3 / 2) := by
        rw [integral_mul_right]; congr; ext t
        field_simp [ha_pos.ne', rpow_mul (le_of_lt ha_pos)]; ring
      rw [this, mul_comm, mul_assoc, div_mul_cancel₀ _ C_pos.ne', mul_comm (1/_), ← mul_assoc, mul_one_div_cancel (sqrt_pos.2 ha_pos).ne', one_mul]
  
  -- Integrability of the scaled kernel
  have scaled_int (a : ℝ) : IntegrableOn (fun t ↦ (1 - exp (-t * |a|)) / t ^ (3 / 2)) (Ioi 0) := by
    rcases eq_or_lt_of_le (abs_nonneg a) with h0 | hpos
    · simp [h0]; apply integrableOn_zero
    · rw [← integrableOn_comp_mul_left_Ioi_iff _ 0 hpos]; convert f_int using 1; ext; simp [abs_mul, abs_of_pos hpos]

  -- Main proof using the integral representation
  simp_rw [sqrt_eq (|x · - x ·|) (abs_nonneg _), sqrt_eq (|x · + x ·|) (abs_nonneg _), sum_mul,
           ← integral_sum (fun _ _ ↦ scaled_int _)]
  refine mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left ?_ (one_div_nonneg.2 C_pos.le)
  apply integral_mono_ae (Integrable.sum fun _ _ ↦ scaled_int _) (Integrable.sum fun _ _ ↦ scaled_int _)
  filter_upwards [self_mem_nhdsWithin] with t ht
  simp only [sum_sub_distrib, sub_le_sub_iff_left, div_le_div_right (rpow_pos_of_pos ht (3/2)), sum_div]
  
  -- The core inequality for exponentials
  let y := fun i ↦ t * x i
  suffices ∑ i, ∑ j, exp (-|y i + y j|) ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, exp (-|y i - y j|) by
    convert this using 3 <;> { congr; ext; rw [abs_mul, abs_of_pos ht]; ring }

  simp_rw [← integral_cos_div_one_add_sq]
  rw [← integral_sum, ← integral_sum]
  swap; exact fun _ _ ↦ integrable_cos_div_one_add_sq
  swap; exact fun _ _ ↦ integrable_cos_div_one_add_sq
  apply integral_mono_ae (Integrable.sum fun _ _ ↦ integrable_cos_div_one_add_sq) (Integrable.sum fun _ _ ↦ integrable_cos_div_one_add_sq)
  filter_upwards with s
  simp only [sum_mul, mul_sum]
  refine mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left ?_ (inv_nonneg.2 (by nlinarith))
  
  -- Trig identity sum cos(A-B) - sum cos(A+B) = 2(sum sin)^2 >= 0
  simp only [sum_div]
  have S1 : ∑ i, ∑ j, cos (s * (y i - y j)) = (∑ i, cos (s * y i))^2 + (∑ i, sin (s * y i))^2 := by
    simp only [cos_sub, mul_add, sum_add_distrib, sum_mul, mul_sum, sq]; rfl
  have S2 : ∑ i, ∑ j, cos (s * (y i + y j)) = (∑ i, cos (s * y i))^2 - (∑ i, sin (s * y i))^2 := by
    simp only [cos_add, mul_sub, sum_sub_distrib, sum_mul, mul_sum, sq]; rfl
  rw [S1, S2]; linarith [sq_nonneg (∑ i, sin (s * y i))]

  -- Define the kernel function related to sqrt(|x|)
  let g (t : ℝ) : ℝ := (1 - cos t) / t ^ (3/2)
  let f (t : ℝ) : ℝ≥0∞ := ofReal (g t)
  
  -- Finiteness of the integral constant C
  have C_lt_top : ∫⁻ t in Ioi 0, f t < ⊤ := by
    apply lintegral_lt_top_of_measurable (ContinuousOn.measurable (by continuity)) _
    rw [integrableOn_Ioi_iff_integrableOn_Ioo_and_integrableOn_Ioi]
    constructor
    · refine integrableOn_of_le (fun t ht => ?_) (integrableOn_Ioo_rpow_of_gt (-1/2) (by norm_num))
      rw [norm_of_nonneg (ofReal_nonneg)]; apply ofReal_le_ofReal
      · refine div_le_div (rpow_nonneg (le_of_lt ht.1) _) (one_sub_cos_le_sq_div_two t) (rpow_pos_of_pos ht.1 _) (by linarith)
      · rw [← rpow_add ht.1, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_comm]; norm_num; apply rpow_le_one (le_of_lt ht.1) (le_of_lt ht.2) (by norm_num)
    · refine integrableOn_of_le (fun t ht => ?_) (Integrable.const_mul (integrableOn_Ioi_rpow_of_lt (by norm_num) (by norm_num)) 2)
      rw [norm_of_nonneg (ofReal_nonneg)]; apply ofReal_le_ofReal
      · refine div_le_div (rpow_nonneg (le_of_lt ht) _) (by linarith [cos_le_one t]) (rpow_pos_of_pos ht _) (by linarith)
      · rw [div_eq_mul_inv]; rfl

  let C := ∫⁻ t in Ioi 0, f t
  have C_pos : C ≠ 0 := by
    rw [ne_eq, lintegral_eq_zero_iff (ContinuousOn.measurable (by continuity))]; push_neg
    use 1; simp; simp [g]; linarith [cos_lt_one_of_ne_zero one_ne_zero]

  -- Integral identity: sqrt(|y|) * C = \int (1 - cos(ty))/t^1.5
  have key : ∀ y, ofReal (√|y|) * C = ∫⁻ t in Ioi 0, ofReal (g (t * y)) := by
    intro y
    by_cases hy : y = 0; · simp [hy, g]
    have yp : 0 < |y| := abs_pos.mpr hy
    rw [← lintegral_comp_mul_right_Ioi f yp]
    congr 1; ext t
    by_cases ht : 0 < t; swap; simp [ht, g]
    simp [g, mul_comm t, cos_abs_mul, mul_rpow (le_of_lt ht) (le_of_lt yp)]
    rw [ofReal_div_of_pos (rpow_pos_of_pos yp _), ofReal_mul, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_comm, mul_assoc]
    congr; rw [← ofReal_rpow_of_nonneg (abs_nonneg _) _, rpow_neg (le_of_lt yp), ofReal_inv_of_pos (rpow_pos_of_pos yp _)]

  -- Prove the inequality by switching to integral representation
  rw [← ofReal_le_ofReal_iff (sum_nonneg fun _ _ => sqrt_nonneg _)]
  simp_rw [ofReal_sum (sum_nonneg fun _ _ => sqrt_nonneg _)]
  rw [← ENNReal.mul_le_mul_right C_pos C_lt_top]
  simp_rw [Finset.mul_sum, key, lintegral_finset_sum]
  apply lintegral_mono; intro t
  by_cases ht : 0 < t; swap; simp [ht, g]
  simp only [g, ofReal_sum (div_nonneg (one_sub_cos_nonneg _) (rpow_nonneg (le_of_lt ht) _))]
  rw [← Finset.sum_div, ← Finset.sum_div, ofReal_div_of_pos (rpow_pos_of_pos ht _), ENNReal.div_le_div_right]
  · rw [ofReal_le_ofReal_iff (sum_nonneg fun _ _ => sub_nonneg.mpr (cos_le_one _))]
    rw [← sub_nonneg, ← Finset.sum_sub_distrib, ← Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
    have : ∑ i, ∑ j, (1 - cos (t * (x i + x j)) - (1 - cos (t * (x i - x j)))) = 2 * (∑ i, sin (t * x i)) ^ 2 := by
      simp_rw [sub_sub_sub_cancel_left, sub_neg_eq_add, cos_sub, cos_add, sub_sub_sub_cancel_right]
      rw [Finset.sum_comm]; simp_rw [← Finset.mul_sum, ← Finset.sum_mul]; ring
    rw [this]; apply mul_nonneg (by norm_num) (sq_nonneg _)
  · simp; exact ofReal_ne_top
  · simp; exact ofReal_ne_top

open Real Complex MeasureTheory MeasureTheory.Measure
  let I (y : ℝ) := ∫ t in Set.Ioi (0:ℝ), (1 - exp (-t * |y|)) / t ^ (3/2)
  have hI : ∀ y, I y = √|y| * I 1 := by
    intro y
    by_cases h0 : y = 0; · simp [h0, I]; rw [abs_zero, Real.sqrt_zero, zero_mul]
    have pos : 0 < |y| := abs_pos.mpr h0
    rw [I, I]
    let f (t : ℝ) := (1 - exp (-t * |y|)) / t ^ (3 / 2)
    have : ∫ t in Set.Ioi 0, f t = ∫ u in Set.Ioi 0, (1 - exp (-u)) / (u / |y|) ^ (3 / 2) * (1 / |y|) := by
      rw [← integral_comp_mul_left_Ioi (fun u ↦ (1 - exp (-u)) / u ^ (3/2)) (0:ℝ) pos]
      congr with t
      field_simp [f]
      rcases eq_or_ne t 0 with rfl | ht
      · simp
      · rw [abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt pos), mul_div_cancel_right₀ _ pos]
    rw [this]
    congr 1
    rw [Real.sqrt_eq_rpow, ← Real.rpow_mul (le_of_lt pos), abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt pos)]
    field_simp; ring_nf
    simp only [Real.rpow_neg, Real.rpow_one_div_two, inv_div, one_div]
    exact Real.sqrt_eq_rpow |y|
  have hI1_pos : 0 < I 1 := by
    apply set_integral_pos_of_continuous_on
    · exact (Set.Ioi_isOpen.measure_mono Set.measure_Ioi_ne_zero)
    · exact ContinuousOn.div (ContinuousOn.sub continuousOn_const (continuousOn_exp.comp (continuousOn_id.neg))) (ContinuousOn.rpow_const continuousOn_id _) (by intro x hx; apply ne_of_gt (rpow_pos_of_pos hx _))
    · intro t ht; simp only [Set.mem_Ioi] at ht
      rw [div_pos_iff_of_pos_right (rpow_pos_of_pos ht _), sub_pos, exp_lt_one_iff, neg_lt_zero]
      exact ht
  suffices ∑ i, ∑ j, I (x i - x j) ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, I (x i + x j) by
    simp_rw [hI, Finset.mul_sum] at this
    exact (mul_le_mul_right hI1_pos).mp this
  simp_rw [I, Finset.sum_integral]
  apply integral_mono_of_nonneg
  · exact Integrable.sub (Finset.integrable_sum _ (fun _ _ ↦ by sorry)) (Finset.integrable_sum _ (fun _ _ ↦ by sorry))
  · exact Finset.integrable_sum _ (fun _ _ ↦ by sorry)
  · intro t ht
    simp only [Pi.sub_apply, Finset.sum_sub_distrib, div_eq_mul_inv]
    rw [← sub_mul, mul_nonneg_iff_of_pos_right (by apply rpow_pos_of_pos ht)]
    simp only [sub_nonneg]
    rw [← sub_nonneg, Finset.sum_sub_distrib, ← Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
    -- Reduced to \sum e^{-t|x_i+x_j|} <= \sum e^{-t|x_i-x_j|}
    -- This holds because e^{-|u|} is a PD kernel (Fourier transform of Cauchy)
    -- e^{-|u|} = 1/pi * \int cos(su) / (1+s^2) ds
    -- The inequality becomes \Re(Z^2) <= |Z|^2 inside the integral.
    sorry

-- Define the kernel function k(u) = (1 - cos u) / |u|^(3/2)
  let k : ℝ → ℝ := fun u ↦ (1 - Real.cos u) / |u| ^ (3 / 2 : ℝ)
  
  -- Step 1: Prove k is integrable and its integral C is positive
  have k_nonneg : ∀ u, 0 ≤ k u := fun u ↦ div_nonneg (sub_nonneg.2 (Real.cos_le_one u)) (abs_rpow_nonneg u _)
  
  have k_le_g : ∀ u, k u ≤ 2 * (if |u| ≤ 1 then |u| ^ (1 / 2 : ℝ) else |u| ^ (-3 / 2 : ℝ)) := by
    intro u
    split_ifs with h
    · -- Near 0: 1 - cos u ≤ u^2/2, so k u ≤ u^2/2 * |u|^-1.5 = 0.5 * |u|^0.5 ≤ 2 * ...
      rw [mul_comm, ← div_eq_mul_inv]
      refine le_trans (div_le_div_of_nonneg_right (Real.one_sub_cos_le_half_sq u) (abs_rpow_nonneg u _)) ?_
      rw [sq_abs, ← Real.rpow_nat_cast, div_div, ← Real.rpow_sub (abs_nonneg u), show (2:ℝ) - 1.5 = 0.5 by norm_num]
      linarith [abs_rpow_nonneg u 0.5]
    · -- Away from 0: 1 - cos u ≤ 2, so k u ≤ 2 * |u|^-1.5
      gcongr
      · exact abs_rpow_nonneg u _
      · apply Real.one_sub_cos_le_two
      · rw [Real.rpow_neg (abs_nonneg u), div_eq_mul_inv]

  have k_int : Integrable k := by
    apply Integrable.mono' _ _ k_le_g
    · apply Integrable.const_mul
      apply integrable_on_univ.1
      rw [← integral_add_compl (s := Set.Icc (-1) 1) (measurableSet_Icc)]
      constructor
      · apply IntegrableOn.mono_set (t := Set.Icc (-1) 1) _ (Set.subset_refl _)
        apply (continuousOn_id.abs.rpow_const (fun _ ↦ True.intro)).integrableOn_Icc
      · apply IntegrableOn.mono_set (t := {u | 1 < |u|})
        · apply integrableOn_Ioi_rpow_of_lt (by norm_num) (by norm_num) |>.mono_set
          intro u hu; simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_Ioi] at hu ⊢; exact hu
        · intro u hu; simp only [Set.mem_compl_iff, Set.mem_Icc, not_and, not_le] at hu
          cases abs_lt_or_gt_of_ne (fun h => by simp [h] at hu) with
          | inl h_lt => linarith
          | inr h_gt => exact h_gt
    · exact k_nonneg

  let C := ∫ u, k u
  have C_pos : 0 < C := by
    apply integral_pos_of_continuous_on_pos_of_subset k_int continuous_on_univ k_nonneg (Set.mem_univ 1)
    · simp only [k, abs_one, Real.one_rpow, div_one, sub_pos]
      exact Real.cos_lt_one_of_ne_zero (by norm_num)
    · use 1; simp

  -- Step 2: Establish the identity √|a| = (1/C) * ∫ (1 - cos(ua))/|u|^1.5 du
  have sqrt_eq_int : ∀ a : ℝ, √|a| = (1 / C) * ∫ u, (1 - Real.cos (u * a)) / |u| ^ (3 / 2 : ℝ) := by
    intro a
    rcases eq_or_ne a 0 with rfl | ha
    · simp
    · rw [← mul_inv_cancel_left₀ C_pos.ne.symm (√|a|), mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, eq_comm]
      apply congr_arg (· * ·)
      rw [← integral_mul_left_eq_integral_div _ C_pos.ne.symm]
      conv => rhs; intro u; rw [← div_eq_mul_inv, k]
      rw [← integral_comp_mul_left (fun u ↦ (1 - Real.cos u) / |u|^(3/2)) ha]
      apply integral_congr_ae; filter_upwards
      intro u
      simp only [abs_mul, Real.mul_rpow (abs_nonneg u) (abs_nonneg a), div_div, mul_comm (1 - _),
        mul_div_assoc]
      rw [div_eq_div_iff (by apply Real.rpow_pos_of_pos (abs_pos.2 ha)) (by apply ne_of_gt; apply Real.rpow_pos_of_pos (abs_pos.2 ha)),
          ← Real.rpow_add (abs_pos.2 ha), show (1.5:ℝ) + 1 = 2.5 by norm_num]
      -- Just verify scaling: |a|^1.5 in denom vs |a|^-1 outside from change of vars?
      -- integral_comp_mul_left gives |a|⁻¹ factor.
      -- So we have |a|⁻¹ * (1 - cos(ua)) / (|u|*|a|)^1.5 * |a|^1.5 ? No.
      -- Let's trace carefully.
      -- RHS of target: (1/C) * ∫ ...
      -- We want C * √|a| = ∫ (1 - cos(ua)) / |u|^1.5 du
      -- Substitute v = ua, u = v/a, du = dv/|a|
      -- ∫ (1 - cos v) / |v/a|^1.5 * (1/|a|) dv
      -- = ∫ (1 - cos v) / (|v|^1.5 * |a|^-1.5) * |a|^-1 dv
      -- = ∫ (1 - cos v) / |v|^1.5 * |a|^1.5 * |a|^-1 dv
      -- = |a|^0.5 * ∫ k(v) dv = √|a| * C.
      -- Correct.
      field_simp [Real.rpow_pos_of_pos (abs_pos.2 ha)]
      rw [← Real.rpow_add (abs_pos.2 ha)]
      norm_num

  -- Step 3: Substitute integral into the inequality
  let F (y : ℝ) := ∫ u, (1 - Real.cos (u * y)) / |u| ^ (3 / 2 : ℝ)
  
  -- We want ∑ F(x_i - x_j) ≤ ∑ F(x_i + x_j).
  -- F(y) = ∫ k(u, y) du.
  -- Difference D = ∑ F(x_i + x_j) - ∑ F(x_i - x_j)
  -- = ∫ |u|^-1.5 * ∑ [ (1 - cos(u(x_i+x_j))) - (1 - cos(u(x_i-x_j))) ] du
  -- = ∫ |u|^-1.5 * ∑ [ cos(u(x_i-x_j)) - cos(u(x_i+x_j)) ] du
  -- cos(A-B) - cos(A+B) = 2 sin A sin B.
  -- sum = 2 * (∑ sin(u x_i)) * (∑ sin(u x_j)) = 2 * (∑ sin(u x_i))^2 ≥ 0.
  
  rw [le_iff_sub_nonneg]
  simp_rw [sqrt_eq_int, ← Finset.sum_mul, ← Finset.sum_sub_distrib, mul_nonneg_iff_of_pos_left (inv_pos.2 C_pos)]
  
  -- Interchange sum and integral
  -- The integrand for fixed y is Integrable (scaled version of k).
  have int_sum : Integrable (fun u ↦ ∑ i, ∑ j, ((1 - Real.cos (u * (x i + x j))) - (1 - Real.cos (u * (x i - x j)))) / |u|^(3/2)) := by
    apply Integrable.sum; intro i _; apply Integrable.sum; intro j _
    apply Integrable.sub
    all_goals
      convert (k_int.comp_mul_left (by nlinarith)).const_mul (|x i ± x j|^(3/2) * |x i ± x j|⁻¹) using 1
      · simp [k]; try rcases eq_or_ne (x i ± x j) 0 with h | h
        · simp [h]
        · field_simp [abs_mul, Real.mul_rpow, abs_nonneg]; ring
  
  rw [← integral_finset_sum _ (fun i _ ↦ int_sum.of_finset_sum)]; swap; exact n
  rw [← integral_finset_sum _ (fun i _ ↦ by apply Integrable.sum; intro j _; exact (int_sum.of_finset_sum i (Finset.mem_univ _)).of_finset_sum)]; swap; exact n
  
  apply integral_nonneg
  intro u
  simp only [sub_sub_sub_cancel_left, sub_div]
  rw [← Finset.sum_div, ← Finset.sum_div]
  apply div_nonneg _ (abs_rpow_nonneg u _)
  
  simp_rw [Real.cos_sub_cos, Real.mul_add, Real.mul_sub]
  -- cos(a - b) - cos(a + b) = -2 sin((a-b + a+b)/2) sin(...) -- wait standard formula
  -- cos(x - y) - cos(x + y) = 2 sin x sin y
  trans ∑ i, ∑ j, 2 * Real.sin (u * x i) * Real.sin (u * x j)
  · apply Finset.sum_congr rfl; intro i _; apply Finset.sum_congr rfl; intro j _
    ring_nf; exact Real.cos_sub_cos_sub_cos_add _ _
  · rw [← Finset.sum_mul]
    rw [Finset.mul_sum]
    rw [← mul_assoc, Finset.sum_mul]
    rw [← sq]
    exact mul_nonneg zero_le_two (sq_nonneg _)

let g (t : ℝ) := (1 - Real.cos t) / |t| ^ (3 / 2)
  let K := ∫ t, g t
  have h_int (y : ℝ) : ∫ t, (1 - Real.cos (y * t)) / |t| ^ (3 / 2) = K * √|y| := by
    rcases eq_or_ne y 0 with rfl | hy; · simp
    have : 0 < |y| := abs_pos.mpr hy
    rw [← MeasureTheory.integral_comp_mul_right y g, ← abs_eq_self.mpr (Real.sqrt_nonneg _)]
    congr; ext t
    rcases eq_or_ne t 0 with rfl | ht; · simp [g]
    simp [g, abs_mul, mul_pow]; field_simp; ring_nf; rw [Real.rpow_def_of_pos this]; ring_nf
  have h_int_y (y : ℝ) : MeasureTheory.Integrable (fun t ↦ (1 - Real.cos (y * t)) / |t| ^ (3 / 2)) :=
    MeasureTheory.integrable_one_sub_cos_div_rpow y (by norm_num) (by norm_num)
  simp_rw [← h_int, integral_finset_sum Finset.univ (fun _ _ ↦ h_int_y _), integral_finset_sum Finset.univ (fun _ _ ↦ MeasureTheory.Integrable.sum (fun _ _ ↦ h_int_y _))]
  refine integral_mono_ae (MeasureTheory.Integrable.sum (fun _ _ ↦ MeasureTheory.Integrable.sum (fun _ _ ↦ h_int_y _))) (MeasureTheory.Integrable.sum (fun _ _ ↦ MeasureTheory.Integrable.sum (fun _ _ ↦ h_int_y _))) ?_
  filter_upwards [MeasureTheory.ae_neq_zero] with t ht
  dsimp
  rw [← Finset.sum_div, ← Finset.sum_div, div_le_div_right (abs_rpow_pos ht (by norm_num))]
  simp_rw [sub_eq_add_neg, Finset.sum_add_distrib, neg_le_neg_iff, Real.cos_sub_cos_mul_add_sin_mul, Real.cos_add_cos_mul_sub_sin_mul, Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
  repeat rw [Finset.sum_comm (s := Finset.univ) (t := Finset.univ), Finset.sum_mul_sum]
  linarith [sq_nonneg (∑ i, Real.sin (x i * t))]

let f (t : ℝ) := (1 - cos t) / t ^ (3 / 2 : ℝ)
  have hf : IntegrableOn f (Ioi 0) := by
    refine integrableOn_Ioi_union (by norm_num) ?_ ?_
    · refine (integrableOn_Ioc_rpow_of_gt (-1/2) (by norm_num)).mono_subset ?_ (by simp)
      refine (Integrable.mono (integrableOn_Ioc_rpow_of_gt (-1/2) (by norm_num)).const_mul (1/2) ?_ ?_)
      · apply ContinuousOn.aestronglyMeasurable; apply MeasurableSet.Ioc
        exact (continuous_id.sub continuous_cos).continuousOn.div (continuous_rpow_const.continuousOn) (by intro x hx; linarith [hx.1])
      · intro t ht; dsimp [f]
        rw [abs_of_nonneg (div_nonneg (sub_nonneg.mpr (cos_le_one t)) (rpow_nonneg_of_nonneg ht.1.le _))]
        rw [show 1 - cos t = 2 * sin (t/2)^2 from by rw [←cos_sub_cos, zero_sub, cos_zero]; ring]
        calc 2 * sin (t/2)^2 / t^(3/2) ≤ 2 * (t/2)^2 / t^(3/2) := by gcongr; apply sin_le_self; linarith [ht.1]
          _ = 1/2 * t^(-1/2 : ℝ) := by field_simp; rw [←rpow_nat_cast, ←rpow_sub ht.1]; norm_num
    · refine (integrableOn_Ioi_rpow_of_lt (3/2) (by norm_num)).mono_subset ?_ (by simp)
      refine (Integrable.mono (integrableOn_Ioi_rpow_of_lt (3/2) (by norm_num)).const_mul 2 ?_ ?_)
      · apply ContinuousOn.aestronglyMeasurable; apply measurableSet_Ioi
        exact (continuous_id.sub continuous_cos).continuousOn.div (continuous_rpow_const.continuousOn) (by intro x hx; linarith [hx.1])
      · intro t ht; dsimp [f]
        rw [abs_of_nonneg (div_nonneg (sub_nonneg.mpr (cos_le_one t)) (rpow_nonneg_of_nonneg (le_trans (by norm_num) ht) _))]
        gcongr; linarith [cos_ge_minus_one t]

  let C := ∫ t in Ioi 0, f t
  have hC : 0 < C := by
    apply integral_pos_of_integrable_of_nonneg_of_pos_on_subset hf
    · intro; dsimp [f]; positivity
    · have : (0:ℝ) < 2 * π := by linarith [pi_pos];
      exact measure_Ioo_pos.mpr this
    · exact Ioo_subset_Ioi_self
    · intro t ht; dsimp [f]; rw [sub_pos, lt_iff_le_and_ne]; exact ⟨cos_le_one t, by rw [ne_comm]; apply cos_ne_one_of_ne_zero; linarith [ht.1, ht.2]⟩
  
  have h_int : ∀ y, IntegrableOn (fun t ↦ (1 - cos (t * y)) / t ^ (3/2 : ℝ)) (Ioi 0) := by
    intro y
    rcases eq_or_ne y 0 with rfl | hy
    · simp; apply integrableOn_zero
    · have : 0 < |y| := abs_pos.mpr hy
      convert (hf.comp_mul_right_Ioi this).const_mul (|y|^(3/2:ℝ)) using 1
      ext t; dsimp [f]; rw [mul_rpow (le_of_lt t.prop) (le_of_lt this)]; field_simp; ring
      rw [cos_abs]

  have h_eq : ∀ y, ∫ t in Ioi 0, (1 - cos (t * y)) / t ^ (3/2 : ℝ) = C * √|y| := by
    intro y
    rcases eq_or_ne y 0 with rfl | hy
    · simp [C, f]; rw [integral_zero_of_ne]; simp; intro; simp
    · have : 0 < |y| := abs_pos.mpr hy
      rw [← integral_comp_mul_right_Ioi f this, mul_comm]
      congr 1; ext t
      dsimp [f]; rw [mul_rpow (le_of_lt t.prop) (le_of_lt this)]
      rw [← cos_abs (t * y), abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt t.prop)]
      field_simp; ring

  simp_rw [← div_le_div_iff_of_pos_left hC, ← h_eq]
  rw [← integral_finset_sum (Finset.univ) (fun i _ => h_int _),
      ← integral_finset_sum (Finset.univ) (fun i _ => h_int _)]
  · apply integral_mono_ae (Integrable.sum (fun _ _ => Integrable.sum (fun _ _ => h_int _)))
      (Integrable.sum (fun _ _ => Integrable.sum (fun _ _ => h_int _)))
    filter_upwards with t
    dsimp
    simp_rw [div_eq_mul_inv, ← Finset.sum_mul, mul_le_mul_right (rpow_pos_of_pos t.prop _)]
    simp_rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin, nsmul_eq_mul, sub_le_sub_iff_left]
    let z := ∑ k, cexp (Complex.I * (t * x k))
    have h_abs : ∑ i, ∑ j, cos (t * (x i - x j)) = Complex.abs z ^ 2 := by
      simp_rw [Complex.abs_sq, z, map_sum, map_mul, Finset.sum_mul, Finset.mul_sum]
      congr 1; ext i; congr 1; ext j
      rw [← exp_sub, ← mul_sub, mul_comm Complex.I, exp_mul_I, add_comm, re_add_im, ofReal_cos]
    have h_re : ∑ i, ∑ j, cos (t * (x i + x j)) = (z ^ 2).re := by
      simp_rw [sq, z, Finset.sum_mul, Finset.mul_sum]
      congr 1; ext i; congr 1; ext j
      rw [← exp_add, ← mul_add, mul_comm Complex.I, exp_mul_I, ofReal_cos]
    rw [h_abs, h_re]
    exact re_le_abs (z ^ 2)
  all_goals {
    try apply Integrable.sum; intro _ _; apply Integrable.sum; intro _ _
    exact h_int _ }

open Real Set MeasureTheory
  let g (t : ℝ) := (1 - cos t) / t ^ (3 / 2 : ℝ)

  -- Prove g is integrable on (0, ∞)
  have g_int : IntegrableOn g (Ioi 0) := by
    refine integrableOn_Ioi_of_continuousAt_of_le_of_isBigO (fun t ht ↦ ?_) (fun t ht ↦ ?_) (fun t ht ↦ ?_)
    · exact (continuousAt_cos.sub continuousAt_const).div (continuousAt_rpow_const _ _ (by right; positivity)) (by positivity)

      rw [div_eq_mul_inv, ← rpow_neg (le_of_lt ht), ← rpow_natCast, ← rpow_add ht]

      · rw [norm_of_nonneg (by positivity)]; refine div_le_div_of_nonneg_right ?_ (by positivity)
        linarith [cos_le_one t]
      · simp; exact div_le_div_of_nonneg_right (by norm_num) (by positivity)

  let K := ∫ t in Ioi 0, g t
  have K_pos : 0 < K := by
    refine integral_pos_iff_support_of_nonneg (fun t ht ↦ ?_) g_int |>.mpr ?_
    · positivity
    · use 1; simp; constructor <;> norm_num

  -- Identity: √|u| * K = ∫ (1 - cos(tu))/t^1.5 dt
  have identity : ∀ u : ℝ, K * √|u| = ∫ t in Ioi 0, (1 - cos (t * u)) / t ^ (3 / 2 : ℝ) := by
    intro u
    by_cases hu : u = 0
    · simp [hu]
    · let u' := |u|
      have hu' : 0 < u' := abs_pos.mpr hu
      rw [← integral_comp_mul_right_Ioi (fun t ↦ g t) _ hu']
      congr 1; rw [← integral_mul_right]; apply set_integral_congr; intro t ht
      dsimp [g]; rw [mul_comm u', mul_div_assoc]; congr 1

    exact (mul_le_mul_left K_pos).mp this

  apply set_integral_mono (Finset.integrable_sum _ fun _ _ ↦ Finset.integrable_sum _ fun _ _ ↦ g_int.comp_mul_right _)
  · apply Finset.integrable_sum _ fun _ _ ↦ Finset.integrable_sum _ fun _ _ ↦ g_int.comp_mul_right _
  · intro t ht
    -- Algebraic reduction

    have h2 : ∑ i, ∑ j, (1 - cos (t * (x i + x j))) = n ^ 2 - (z ^ 2).re := by
      simp only [sum_sub_distrib, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul, mul_one, Nat.cast_sum]
      simp_rw [cos_add, cos_mul, sin_mul, Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
      rw [sub_right_inj]; simp [z, pow_two, ← Finset.sum_mul]; rfl

    rw [h1, h2]; apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_right _ (rpow_nonneg (le_of_lt ht) _)

  have hf : MeasureTheory.IntegrableOn f (Set.Ioi 0) := by

    · fun_prop
    · fun_prop
    · rw [Asymptotics.isBigO_iff]; use 1/2
      filter_upwards [Filter.Ioo_mem_nhdsWithin_Ioi (by norm_num : (0:ℝ) < 1)] with u hu
      rw [Real.norm_eq_abs, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg (Real.one_sub_cos_nonneg _),
          Real.abs_rpow_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hu.1)]
      calc (1 - Real.cos u) / u ^ (3 / 2 : ℝ) 
        ≤ (u ^ 2 / 2) / u ^ (3 / 2 : ℝ) := by gcongr; exact Real.one_sub_cos_le_sq_div_two u
      _ = 1 / 2 * u ^ (1 / 2 : ℝ) := by rw [div_eq_mul_one_div, ← Real.rpow_sub hu.1]; norm_num
      _ = (1/2) * |u| ^ (1/2 : ℝ) := by rw [abs_of_pos hu.1]; norm_num
    · rw [Asymptotics.isBigO_iff]; use 2
      filter_upwards [Filter.Ioi_mem_atTop (1:ℝ)] with u hu
      rw [Real.norm_eq_abs, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg (Real.one_sub_cos_nonneg _),
          Real.abs_rpow_of_nonneg (le_trans (by norm_num) (Set.mem_Ioi.mp hu))]
      calc (1 - Real.cos u) / u ^ (3 / 2 : ℝ) 
        ≤ 2 / u ^ (3 / 2 : ℝ) := by gcongr; exact Real.cos_le_one u; linarith [Real.cos_le_one u]
        _ = 2 * |u| ^ (-(3 / 2) : ℝ) := by 
          rw [div_eq_mul_inv, Real.rpow_neg (le_trans (by norm_num) (Set.mem_Ioi.mp hu))]; 
          rw [abs_of_pos (lt_trans (by norm_num) (Set.mem_Ioi.mp hu))]; norm_num

    · intro u hu; apply div_nonneg (Real.one_sub_cos_nonneg _) (Real.rpow_nonneg (le_of_lt hu) _)

-- We rely on the identity √|y| = c * ∫₀^∞ (1 - exp(-s * y^2)) * s^(-5/4) ds
  -- and the inequality ∑ exp(-s(xi-xj)^2) ≥ ∑ exp(-s(xi+xj)^2).

  -- 1. Gaussian Inequality via Taylor series of sinh
  have gaussian_ineq (c : ℝ) (hc : 0 ≤ c) :
      ∑ i, ∑ j, (1 - Real.exp (-c * (x i - x j) ^ 2)) ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, (1 - Real.exp (-c * (x i + x j) ^ 2)) := by
    simp_rw [pow_two, mul_sub, mul_add, Real.exp_add, Real.exp_neg, Real.exp_sub, 
             ← div_eq_mul_inv, ← mul_sub, sub_le_sub_iff, ge_iff_le]
    let u := λ i => Real.exp (-c * x i ^ 2)
    -- Reduce to ∑ u_i u_j sinh(2c x_i x_j) ≥ 0
    suffices 0 ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, u i * u j * (Real.exp (2 * c * x i * x j) - Real.exp (-2 * c * x i * x j)) by
      simpa only [mul_assoc, ← Finset.mul_sum] using this
    simp_rw [Real.exp_sub_exp_neg, mul_assoc]
    -- Swap sum and series using absolute convergence
    rw [Real.sinh_eq_tsum_two_mul_add_one]
    have h_summable (y : ℝ) := Real.sinh_summable_two_mul_add_one y
    rw [tsum_sum]
    · rw [tsum_sum]
      · apply tsum_nonneg; intro k
        -- Term is 2 * (2c)^(2k+1)/(2k+1)! * (∑ u_i x_i^(2k+1))^2
        simp_rw [mul_assoc, ← Finset.sum_mul_sum]
        refine mul_nonneg (by positivity) (sq_nonneg _)
      · intro i; apply Summable.mul_left; apply h_summable
    · intro i; apply Summable.sum; intro j _; apply Summable.mul_left; apply h_summable

  -- 2. Integral Representation
  let p : ℝ := 5 / 4
  let f (s : ℝ) := (1 - Real.exp (-s)) / s ^ p
  
  -- Integrability of f on (0, ∞)
  have h_int : IntegrableOn f (Set.Ioi 0) := by
    refine integrableOn_Ioi_iff_integrableOn_Ioc_integrableOn_Ioi.mpr ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · apply Asymptotics.IsBigO.integrableOn_Ioc_rpow_of_gt (-1) (by norm_num)
      rw [Asymptotics.isBigO_iff]; use 1
      filter_upwards [Filter.Ioc_mem_nhdsWithin_Ioi (x:=0) (by norm_num)] with y hy
      rw [Real.norm_eq_abs, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg hy.1.le, abs_of_nonneg (by positivity)]
      convert Real.abs_one_sub_exp_neg_le_self_of_nonneg hy.1.le using 2
      rw [abs_of_nonneg hy.1.le, pow_neg, ← div_eq_mul_inv, div_eq_div_iff (by positivity) (by positivity)]
      ring_nf; rw [rpow_add hy.1.le]; norm_num
    · apply Asymptotics.IsBigO.integrableOn_Ioi_rpow_of_lt (by norm_num)
      rw [Asymptotics.isBigO_iff]; use 2
      filter_upwards [Filter.mem_nhdsWithin_Ioi_iff_exists_Ioi_subset.mpr ⟨1, by simp, Set.Ioi_subset_Ioi_iff.mpr (by norm_num)⟩] with y hy
      rw [Real.norm_eq_abs, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg (by linarith), abs_of_nonneg (by positivity)]
      rw [div_le_div_iff (by positivity) (by positivity), mul_one]
      linarith [Real.exp_neg_le_one_of_nonneg (by linarith : 0 ≤ y)]

  let C := ∫ s in Set.Ioi 0, f s
  have hC : 0 ≤ C := integral_nonneg (by intro x hx; apply div_nonneg (by simp [Real.exp_le_one_iff.mpr (neg_nonpos.mpr hx.le)]) (by positivity))

  -- Identity for y >= 0: y^(1/4) * C = ∫ (1 - e^(-sy)) / s^p
  have term_eq (y : ℝ) (hy : 0 ≤ y) : y ^ (1/4 : ℝ) * C = ∫ s in Set.Ioi 0, (1 - Real.exp (-s * y)) / s ^ p := by
    rcases eq_or_lt_of_le hy with rfl | hy_pos
    · simp only [mul_zero, Real.exp_zero, sub_self, zero_div, integral_zero, zero_rpow (by norm_num), mul_zero]
    · rw [← MeasureTheory.integral_comp_mul_right_Ioi _ _ hy_pos]
      simp_rw [mul_comm _ y, mul_div_assoc]
      congr 1; apply MeasureTheory.integral_congr_ae; filter_upwards with s
      rw [mul_pow, mul_div_mul_right _ _ (by positivity), div_div, mul_comm, ← pow_succ, 
          show p - 1 + 1 = p by norm_num, show p - 1 = 1/4 by norm_num]

  -- 3. Conclusion
  -- Rewrite sums using integral
  have sqrt_eq (z : ℝ) : √|z| * C = ∫ s in Set.Ioi 0, (1 - Real.exp (-s * z ^ 2)) / s ^ p := by
    rw [← term_eq (z^2) (sq_nonneg z), mul_assoc, ← Real.rpow_mul (sq_nonneg z), 
        mul_div_cancel_left _ (by norm_num : (2:ℝ) ≠ 0), Real.sqrt_eq_rpow, Real.norm_eq_abs]
  
  simp_rw [mul_comm _ C, ← Finset.sum_mul]
  refine mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right ?_ hC
  simp_rw [sqrt_eq, ← MeasureTheory.integral_sum]
  · apply MeasureTheory.integral_mono_ae
    · apply Integrable.sum; intro _ _; apply Integrable.sum; intro _ _
      -- Integrability of scaled f: (1 - exp(-s * A)) / s^p = A^p * f(sA)
      by_cases hA : (x i - x j)^2 = 0; · simp [hA, integrable_zero]
      exact (h_int.comp_mul_right_Ioi ((x i - x j)^2) (by positivity)).const_mul _
    · apply Integrable.sum; intro _ _; apply Integrable.sum; intro _ _
      by_cases hA : (x i + x j)^2 = 0; · simp [hA, integrable_zero]
      exact (h_int.comp_mul_right_Ioi ((x i + x j)^2) (by positivity)).const_mul _
    · filter_upwards with s; by_cases hs : 0 < s
      · simp_rw [div_eq_mul_inv, ← Finset.sum_mul]
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (gaussian_ineq s hs.le) (by positivity)
      · simp
  · -- Summable args required for integral_sum (implied by integrable)
    intro _ _; apply Integrable.sum; intro _ _
    by_cases hA : (x i - x j)^2 = 0; · simp [hA, integrable_zero]
    exact (h_int.comp_mul_right_Ioi _ (by positivity)).const_mul _
  · intro _ _; apply Integrable.sum; intro _ _
    by_cases hA : (x i + x j)^2 = 0; · simp [hA, integrable_zero]
    exact (h_int.comp_mul_right_Ioi _ (by positivity)).const_mul _
